title: OpenAI US House Select Committee Update
note: This is the clean backbone for OpenAI historical years and overrides the weaker local site floor.

title: Epoch AI data centers
note: Epoch AI site registry rolled up into a single-user lower bound for later years.

title: AWS and OpenAI announce multi-year strategic partnership
quant_signal: hundreds of thousands of NVIDIA GPUs; all capacity targeted to deploy before end-2026
note: Useful as a 2026 ramp signal, but not safe to add one-for-one on top of Stargate umbrella claims.

title: OpenAI, Oracle, and SoftBank expand Stargate with five new AI data center sites
quant_signal: nearly 7 GW planned capacity; over 5.5 GW from newly described sites; path to 10 GW commitment
note: Strong directional evidence for scale, but explicitly not additive with sub-site or provider components.

title: OpenAI and NVIDIA announce strategic partnership
quant_signal: 10 GW partnership; first 1 GW starts in H2 2026
note: Useful timing evidence for 2026, but too overlap-heavy to stack broadly.

title: OpenAI partners with Cerebras
quant_signal: 750 MW phased through 2028
note: Phased and partly independent of Stargate campuses, but still not fully additive without utilization timing.

title: OpenAI and SoftBank Group partner with SB Energy
quant_signal: 1.2 GW initial buildout
note: Important as a buildout lane, but likely overlaps with broader Stargate and site-level counts.

title: Inside the world's most powerful AI datacenter
quant_signal: Fairwater powers OpenAI, Microsoft AI, Copilot, and other workloads
note: Prevents assigning all Fairwater Wisconsin capacity to OpenAI in the single-number series.

title: OpenAI OSTP RFI response
quant_signal: already announced capacity brings Stargate to nearly 7 GW planned; references Wisconsin grid-connected capacity
note: Useful as an internal consistency check on the Stargate trajectory rather than a separable MW source.

title: AP: Microsoft takes over part of Crusoe's Abilene data center project
quant_signal: Abilene / Oracle / Microsoft complex expected around 2.1 GW
note: Independent evidence that the OpenAI/Oracle/Crusoe/Microsoft buildout is physically real and already very large.

title: Data Center Dynamics: OpenAI confirmed to be behind Oracle cloud deal
quant_signal: about 4.5 GW expected across multiple data center sites
note: Independent trade-press support that OpenAI's later-year footprint is multi-gigawatt even after de-duplication concerns.

title: Anthropic forges partnership with Google Cloud
quant_signal: partnership and cloud access in 2023
note: Part of the reason Anthropic cannot be zero in 2023.

title: Cloud TPU v5e is generally available
quant_signal: Anthropic already using TPU v5e to scale Claude serving
note: Strong proof that Anthropic had meaningful Google-side compute before the site tracker saw it.

title: CMA full text decision on Google / Anthropic
quant_signal: Anthropic sourced compute from Google and Amazon in 2023
note: Important orthogonal proof that Anthropic had multi-cloud compute before the visible floor turns on.

title: Powering the next generation of AI development with AWS
quant_signal: AWS as primary training partner; Project Rainier positioning
note: Defines AWS as the primary Anthropic training lane heading into 2025.

title: Claude 3.5 Haiku on AWS Trainium2 and model distillation
quant_signal: hundreds of thousands of Trainium2 chips; >5x current-generation compute
note: Crucial quantitative anchor that rules out tiny 2024 Anthropic numbers.

title: AWS activates Project Rainier
quant_signal: nearly 500,000 live chips and >1 million by end-2025
note: Best hard AWS-side Anthropic scale anchor.

title: Expanding our use of Google Cloud TPUs and Services
quant_signal: up to 1 million TPUs and well over 1 GW online in 2026
note: Best direct Anthropic anchor for moving above the AWS-heavy visible floor in 2026.

title: Build AI in America
quant_signal: 2 GW data centers for a single training run in 2027 and 5 GW in 2028
note: This is the strongest late-year Anthropic anchor and prevents the series from falling back to the floor in 2028.

title: Hut 8 Announces AI Infrastructure Partnership with Anthropic and Fluidstack
quant_signal: 245 MW initial River Bend tranche, up to 2,295 MW broader pipeline
note: Supports further Anthropic growth beyond the 2027 floor.

title: Microsoft, NVIDIA and Anthropic announce strategic partnerships
quant_signal: up to 1 GW additional Azure/NVIDIA capacity
note: Important upside lane, but too overlap-sensitive to count fully in 2026 or 2027.

title: AP: Anthropic inks multibillion-dollar deal with Google for AI chips
quant_signal: up to 1 million TPUs and well over 1 GW in 2026
note: Independent media corroboration of the official Google TPU announcement.

title: Data Center Dynamics: Hut 8 signs 245MW capacity deal with Fluidstack
quant_signal: 245 MW initial River Bend capacity with optional additional capacity
note: Independent trade-press corroboration that the River Bend lane is real and non-trivial.

title: Anthropic expands partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation compute
quant_signal: multiple gigawatts of next-generation TPU capacity starting in 2027
note: New direct Anthropic evidence that the Google lane expands materially again from 2027 onward; it strengthens the projected ramp more than the March 2026 current point.

title: SemiAnalysis Datacenter Industry Model
quant_signal: tracks datacenter capacity by hyperscaler, AI lab, site, and region
note: Shared cross-check for both companies; not used as a numeric anchor.
